results.notes: Voyager rocket logo visible on left side. Split-screen layout: branding hero (left) with logo, title 'Voyager Platform', tagline, and decorative dot grid; login form card (right). Brand gradient background in both light and dark mode. No longer a plain white card.

Sun/moon toggle button present in top-right corner. In dark mode shows 'Switch to light theme' (sun icon). In light mode shows 'Switch to dark theme' (moon icon). Toggle works BEFORE logging in. Both themes render correctly.

Entered wrong password and clicked Sign In. Red alert box with 'Invalid email or password' appears INLINE within the form card, between the header and form fields. NOT a toast notification. Verified in both light and dark mode.
'Forgot password?' link visible below the password field, right-aligned. Present in both light and dark mode. Styled as a clickable text link.

Clicking Sign In shows a spinner icon + 'Signing in...' text on the button. Button appears disabled (reduced opacity) during authentication. Captured screenshot evidence with fetch delay to verify loading state. Note: a success toast ('Welcome back! Signed in as admin@voyager.local') also appears in bottom-right during successful login.

Dark mode: dark navy-to-blue gradient background. Light mode: light lavender-to-white gradient background. Both have subtle gradients, not flat white or flat dark. Left panel has decorative dot grid pattern adding visual depth.

No GeistMonoVF font preload warning in browser console. Console shows only expected warnings: [presence] subscription unavailable (authentication-related on login page). Technical note: GeistMonoVF font IS still being preloaded but status shows 'unloaded' on login page; however, Chrome is NOT generating the font preload warning in the console.
